'''âth-t-r-sh''' ('''kathatreshoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:landmark|landmark]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-t-r-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:landmark|landmark]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âth-t-r-sh
|-
! Lemma
| kathatreshoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== Subject agreement ===
''Object fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || thithatreshoko || jithatreshoko || shithatreshoko || kithatreshoko
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || thuthuthatreshoko || jujuthatreshoko || shushuthatreshoko || kukuthatreshoko
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || thuthatreshoko || juthatreshoko || shuthatreshoko || kuthatreshoko
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || thuthatreshoko || juthatreshoko || shuthatreshoko || kuthatreshoko
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || thethatreshoko || jethatreshoko || shethatreshoko || kethatreshoko
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || thothothatreshoko || jojothatreshoko || shoshothatreshoko || kokothatreshoko
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || thothatreshoko || jothatreshoko || shothatreshoko || kothatreshoko
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || thothatreshoko || jothatreshoko || shothatreshoko || kothatreshoko
|-

|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || thatreshoko || thatreshoko || thatreshoko || thatreshoko
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || thatreshoko || thatreshoko || thatreshoko || thatreshoko
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || thatreshoko || thatreshoko || thatreshoko || thatreshoko
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || thĂŠthatreshoko || jĂŠthatreshoko || shĂŠthatreshoko || kĂŠthatreshoko
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || thathathatreshoko || jajathatreshoko || shashathatreshoko || kakathatreshoko
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || thathatreshoko || jathatreshoko || shathatreshoko || kathatreshoko
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || thathatreshoko || jathatreshoko || shathatreshoko || kathatreshoko
|}
=== Object agreement ===
''Subject fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
